Form Factor Categories

Coffee — Ground, instant, beans & K-Cup mushroom coffee
Mushroom Powder — Pure supplement powder (not drink mixes)
Other Drink Powder — Tea, matcha, hot chocolate, protein mixes
RTD Beverage — Cans, bottles, shots, ready-to-drink
Gummy — Chewable gummy supplements
Chocolate — Bars (not drink mixes)
Liquid — Tinctures & liquid supplement drops
Capsule/Tablet — Capsules, softgels, tablets & liposomal
